title: A dining experience that feels like home in nature.
subtitle: Surrounded by trees and greenery, with tasty food and good parking — everything you need for a relaxed family meal.

items.title: Nature-Inspired Setting
items.description: Surrounded by trees and plants on the city outskirts — a nice, peaceful place to enjoy a meal away from the bustle.

items.title: Veg & Non-Veg Options
items.description: Super tasty veg and non-veg food available with vegan options. All you can eat, small plates, quick bites, and coffee.

items.title: Late-Night Dining
items.description: Open until 1 AM every night. Perfect for midnight buffet cravings and late-night food runs.

items.title: Family & Group Friendly
items.description: Good for kids, groups, and tourists. Casual and quiet atmosphere with both table service and self-service options.
